documents.text: Acme Corp offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on all hardware products. Refunds are processed within 5 business days to the original payment method.
Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping (1-2 business days) is available for an additional $15. Acme ships to the US and Canada only.
The Acme Widget Pro weighs 1.2 kg, supports Bluetooth 5.2, and has a battery life of 18 hours on a single charge.
